fields.acceptance_criteria: Visual state badge showing current state; dropdown or button row showing valid next transitions from schema; click advances state via PATCH; undo button reverts last transition; required_states warning before close; confirmation dialog for terminal states
fields.title: Feature: State transition UI — visual state machine with advance/undo
